ck_delivery_state.name: ck_delivery_state
ck_delivery_state.value:
(
          ("order"."delivery"."delivery_status" <> 'CANCELED' AND "order"."delivery"."cancled_at" IS NULL)
          OR
          ("order"."delivery"."delivery_status" = 'CANCELED' AND "order"."delivery"."cancled_at" IS NOT NULL)
          )

ck_payment_state.name: ck_payment_state
ck_payment_state.value:
(
          ("order"."payment"."payment_status" <> 'CANCELED' AND "order"."payment"."deleted_at" IS NULL)
          OR
          ("order"."payment"."payment_status" = 'CANCELED' AND "order"."payment"."deleted_at" IS NOT NULL)
          )

ck_payment_method_state.name: ck_payment_method_state
ck_payment_method_state.value:
(
          ("order"."payment_method"."is_valid" = TRUE AND "order"."payment_method"."deleted_at" IS NULL)
          OR
          ("order"."payment_method"."is_valid" = FALSE AND "order"."payment_method"."deleted_at" IS NOT NULL)
          )

          )
